title: Socha Na Tha
desc: Viren and Aditi don't like each other at first when their families arrange their marriage. But after becoming friends, they slowly fall in love and see things differently.

title: Thalapathy is the G.O.A.T.
desc: Gandhi, an undercover agent, faces danger and heartbreak when his family gets caught in his secret missions. Years later, he reunites with a lookalike of his lost son, but trouble looms.

title: Seetimaar
desc: A bank employee and kabaddi coach strives to make his father's school and village team champions, facing challenges that test his patience and passion.

title: Starry Nights S01
desc: Celebrities show their fun side in this chat show with Komal Nahta. Big stars share jokes, stories, and moments that fans have never seen before, making it super entertaining.

title: Kesari
desc: True story of Havildar Ishar Singh, who leads 21 Sikh soldiers of the British Indian Army in the historic Battle of Saragarhi, bravely fighting against overwhelming odds to defend their post.

title: Love
desc: Prithvi falls in love with Maggie, but her parents reject him for his criminal past. Determined to change, he fights to prove his worth and earn their acceptance.

desc: Chatur Singh, a clumsy cop, is sent to solve a murder in South Africa but ends up tangled in chaos with oddballs and diamonds that test his last shot at redemption.
